info.title: Workbench
info.description: Incursa Workbench is a .NET tool for managing structured project documentation, work items, repository workflows, and local browser-based editing.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --repo
options.description: Target repo (defaults to current dir)

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (table|json) [default: table]

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable colored output [default: False]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress non-error output [default: False]

options.name: --debug
options.description: Print full exception diagnostics on failure. [default: False]

commands.name: version
commands.description: Print CLI version.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Check git, config, and expected paths.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output machine-readable JSON. [default: False]

commands.name: init
commands.description: Interactive setup for Workbench (scaffold + guidance + guide).

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing files. [default: False]

options.name: --non-interactive
options.description: Run init without prompts (use flags to enable steps). [default: False]

options.name: --skip-guide
options.description: Skip launching the interactive guide after init. [default: False]

options.name: --front-matter
options.description: Add Workbench front matter to docs (non-interactive). [default: False]

options.name: --configure-openai
options.description: Configure OpenAI settings (non-interactive). [default: False]

options.name: --credential-store
options.description: Credential storage: local, external, skip.

options.name: --credential-path
options.description: Credentials file path for local or external storage.

options.name: --openai-provider
options.description: AI provider (openai|none).

options.name: --openai-key
options.description: OpenAI API key (stored in credentials file).

options.name: --openai-model
options.description: OpenAI model (default: gpt-4o-mini).

commands.name: scaffold
commands.description: Create the default folder structure, templates, and config.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing files. [default: False]

commands.name: config
commands.description: Group: configuration commands.

commands.name: show
commands.description: Print effective config (defaults + repo config + CLI overrides).

commands.name: set
commands.description: Write or update config values in .workbench/config.json.

options.name: --path
options.description: Config path in dot notation (e.g., paths.docsRoot).

options.name: --value
options.description: Config value (string by default).

options.name: --json
options.description: Parse the value as JSON (for booleans, numbers, or objects). [default: False]

commands.name: credentials
commands.description: Manage credentials.env entries.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set an entry in credentials.env.

options.name: --key
options.description: Environment variable name.

options.name: --value
options.description: Environment variable value.

options.name: --path
options.description: Credentials file path (defaults to .workbench/credentials.env).

commands.name: unset
commands.description: Remove an entry from credentials.env.

options.name: --key
options.description: Environment variable name.

options.name: --path
options.description: Credentials file path (defaults to .workbench/credentials.env).

commands.name: item
commands.description: Group: work item commands.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a new work item in specs/work-items using templates and ID allocation.

options.name: --type
options.description: Work item type: work_item

options.name: --title
options.description: Work item title

options.name: --status
options.description: Work item status: planned, in_progress, blocked, complete, cancelled, superseded

options.name: --priority
options.description: Work item priority

options.name: --owner
options.description: Work item owner

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a work item draft with AI and create it.

options.name: --prompt
options.description: Freeform description for the AI-generated work item.

options.name: --type
options.description: Work item type: work_item (defaults to AI choice).

options.name: --status
options.description: Work item status: planned, in_progress, blocked, complete, cancelled, superseded

options.name: --priority
options.description: Work item priority

options.name: --owner
options.description: Work item owner

commands.name: import
commands.description: Import GitHub issues into work items.

options.name: --issue
options.description: Issue numbers or URLs to import.

options.name: --type
options.description: Work item type: work_item (defaults based on labels).

options.name: --status
options.description: Work item status: planned, in_progress, blocked, complete, cancelled, superseded

options.name: --priority
options.description: Work item priority

options.name: --owner
options.description: Work item owner

commands.name: sync
commands.description: External sync stage: reconcile local work items with GitHub issues and branch state.

options.name: --id
options.description: Limit external sync to specific work item IDs.

options.name: --issue
options.description: Import or reconcile specific GitHub issues by number or URL.

options.name: --prefer
options.description: When local and GitHub descriptions differ, prefer 'local' or 'github'.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing. [default: False]

options.name: --import-issues
options.description: Import unlinked GitHub issues into local work items (slower). [default: False]

commands.name: list
commands.description: List work items.

options.name: --type
options.description: Filter by type: work_item

options.name: --status
options.description: Filter by status: planned, in_progress, blocked, complete, cancelled, superseded

options.name: --include-terminal-items
options.description: Include terminal items. [default: False]

commands.name: show
commands.description: Show metadata and resolved path for an item.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Update status and updated date.

options.name: --note
options.description: Append a note.

arguments.name: status
arguments.description: New status: planned, in_progress, blocked, complete, cancelled, superseded.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Safely edit structured work item fields and keep title/body/slug alignment coherent.

options.name: --title
options.description: New title. Updates front matter, the H1 heading, and the file slug by default.

options.name: --summary
options.description: Replace the Summary section with inline text.

options.name: --summary-file
options.description: Replace the Summary section from a text file.

options.name: --acceptance
options.description: Replace Acceptance criteria with one or more list entries.

options.name: --acceptance-file
options.description: Replace Acceptance criteria from a text file (one item per non-empty line).

options.name: --append-note
options.description: Append a bullet to the Notes section.

options.name: --keep-path
options.description: Do not rename the file slug when updating the title. [default: False]

commands.name: close
commands.description: Set status to complete.

commands.name: move
commands.description: Move a work item file and update inbound links where possible.

options.name: --to
options.description: Destination path.

commands.name: rename
commands.description: Regenerate slug from title, rename the file, and update inbound links.

options.name: --title
options.description: New title.

commands.name: normalize
commands.description: Normalize work item front matter lists.

options.name: --include-terminal-items
options.description: Include terminal items. [default: False]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete a work item file and update doc backlinks.

options.name: --keep-links
options.description: Skip removing doc backlinks. [default: False]

commands.name: link
commands.description: Link specs, files, PRs, or issues to a work item.

options.name: --spec
options.description: Spec path(s) to link.

options.name: --file
options.description: File path(s) to link.

options.name: --pr
options.description: PR URL(s) to link.

options.name: --issue
options.description: Issue URL(s) or IDs to link.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: unlink
commands.description: Remove specs, files, PRs, or issues from a work item.

options.name: --spec
options.description: Spec path(s) to unlink.

options.name: --file
options.description: File path(s) to unlink.

options.name: --pr
options.description: PR URL(s) to unlink.

options.name: --issue
options.description: Issue URL(s) or IDs to unlink.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: normalize
commands.description: Normalize work item and doc front matter.

options.name: --items
options.description: Normalize work item front matter. [default: False]

options.name: --docs
options.description: Normalize doc front matter. [default: False]

options.name: --include-terminal-items
options.description: Include terminal items. [default: False]

options.name: --all-docs
options.description: Add Workbench front matter to all docs (default). [default: False]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: promote
commands.description: Create a work item, branch, and commit in one step.

options.name: --type
options.description: Work item type: work_item

options.name: --title
options.description: Work item title

options.name: --push
options.description: Push the branch to origin. [default: False]

options.name: --start
options.description: Set status to in-progress. [default: False]

options.name: --pr
options.description: Create a GitHub PR. [default: False]

options.name: --base
options.description: Base branch for PR.

options.name: --draft
options.description: Create a draft PR. [default: False]

options.name: --no-draft
options.description: Create a ready PR. [default: False]

commands.name: github
commands.description: Group: GitHub commands.

commands.name: pr
commands.description: Group: GitHub pull request commands.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a GitHub PR via the configured provider and backlink the PR URL.

options.name: --base
options.description: Base branch for PR.

options.name: --draft
options.description: Create as draft. [default: False]

options.name: --fill
options.description: Fill PR body from work item. [default: False]

commands.name: codex
commands.description: Group: Codex agent commands.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Check whether Codex is installed and callable.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run Codex in full-auto mode with web search.

options.name: --prompt
options.description: Prompt to send to Codex.

options.name: --terminal
options.description: Launch in a separate terminal window instead of waiting for output. [default: False]

commands.name: worktree
commands.description: Group: git worktree commands.

commands.name: start
commands.description: Create or reuse a task worktree.

options.name: --slug
options.description: Short task slug used for branch and directory naming.

options.name: --ticket
options.description: Optional numeric ticket to prefix the branch.

options.name: --base
options.description: Base branch for new branches (defaults to config git.defaultBaseBranch).

options.name: --root
options.description: Root directory for worktrees (defaults to <repo>.worktrees).

options.name: --prompt
options.description: Prompt to send when launching Codex.

options.name: --start-codex
options.description: Launch Codex after creating/reusing the worktree. [default: False]

options.name: --codex-terminal
options.description: When launching Codex, use a separate terminal window. [default: True]

commands.name: doc
commands.description: Group: documentation commands.

commands.name: new
commands.description: Create a documentation file with Workbench front matter.

options.name: --type
options.description: Doc type: specification, architecture, verification, work_item, doc

options.name: --title
options.description: Doc title

options.name: --path
options.description: Destination path (defaults by type).

options.name: --artifact-id
options.description: Artifact identifier for canonical specs, architecture docs, verification docs, and work items.

options.name: --domain
options.description: Document domain metadata used when generating canonical artifact IDs.

options.name: --capability
options.description: Document capability metadata used when generating specification IDs.

options.name: --work-item
options.description: Link one or more work items.

options.name: --code-ref
options.description: Add code reference(s) (e.g., src/Foo.cs#L10-L20).

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing file. [default: False]

commands.name: show
commands.description: Show a documentation file by artifact ID or path.

commands.name: edit
commands.description: Edit documentation metadata and body by artifact ID or path.

options.name: --artifact-id
options.description: Update the artifact identifier.

options.name: --title
options.description: Update the doc title.

options.name: --status
options.description: Update the doc status.

options.name: --owner
options.description: Update the doc owner.

options.name: --domain
options.description: Update the document domain metadata.

options.name: --capability
options.description: Update the document capability metadata.

options.name: --body
options.description: Replace the Markdown body with the provided text.

options.name: --body-file
options.description: Replace the Markdown body with file contents.

options.name: --work-item
options.description: Replace the linked work item list.

options.name: --code-ref
options.description: Replace the linked code ref list.

commands.name: regen-help
commands.description: Regenerate specs/generated/commands.md from the live command tree.

options.name: --check
options.description: Fail if specs/generated/commands.md is out of date. [default: False]

options.name: --path
options.description: Output path (defaults to specs/generated/commands.md).

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete a documentation file and update work item links.

options.name: --path
options.description: Doc path, link, or artifact ID.

options.name: --keep-links
options.description: Skip removing doc links from work items. [default: False]

commands.name: link
commands.description: Link a doc to work items.

options.name: --type
options.description: Doc type: specification, architecture, verification, work_item, doc

options.name: --path
options.description: Doc path, link, or artifact ID.

options.name: --work-item
options.description: Work item ID(s) to link.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: unlink
commands.description: Unlink a doc from work items.

options.name: --type
options.description: Doc type: specification, architecture, verification, work_item, doc

options.name: --path
options.description: Doc path, link, or artifact ID.

options.name: --work-item
options.description: Work item ID(s) to unlink.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Repo metadata stage: sync doc/work-item backlinks and doc front matter. Does not regenerate indexes.

options.name: --all
options.description: Add or normalize Workbench front matter on all docs (default). [default: False]

options.name: --issues
options.description: Sync GitHub issue links while updating doc/work-item backlinks. [default: False]

options.name: --include-terminal-items
options.description: Include terminal work items. [default: False]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: summarize
commands.description: Summarize doc changes with AI and append change notes.

options.name: --staged
options.description: Use staged diff (default when no --path is provided). [default: False]

options.name: --path
options.description: File path(s) to summarize (defaults to staged markdown files).

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

options.name: --update-index
options.description: Run git add on updated files. [default: False]

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Repo metadata stage: sync spec/work-item backlinks and spec front matter. Does not regenerate indexes.

options.name: --all
options.description: Add or normalize Workbench front matter on all specs (default). [default: False]

options.name: --issues
options.description: Sync GitHub issue links while updating spec/work-item backlinks. [default: False]

options.name: --include-terminal-items
options.description: Include terminal work items. [default: False]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: voice
commands.description: Group: voice input commands.

commands.name: workitem
commands.description: Create a work item from voice input.

options.name: --type
options.description: Work item type: work_item (defaults to AI choice).

options.name: --status
options.description: Work item status: planned, in_progress, blocked, complete, cancelled, superseded

options.name: --priority
options.description: Work item priority

options.name: --owner
options.description: Work item owner

commands.name: doc
commands.description: Create a documentation file from voice input.

options.name: --type
options.description: Doc type: specification, architecture, verification, work_item, doc

options.name: --out
options.description: Output path (defaults by type).

options.name: --title
options.description: Doc title (optional).

commands.name: nav
commands.description: Group: navigation/index commands.

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Derived view stage: regenerate canonical indexes, syncing links first by default.

options.name: --issues
options.description: Sync GitHub issue links while rebuilding derived navigation views. [default: True]

options.name: --force
options.description: Rewrite derived index sections even if content is unchanged. [default: False]

options.name: --include-terminal-items
options.description: Include terminal-status work items in derived indexes. [default: False]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: quality
commands.description: Group: repo-native quality evidence commands.

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Discover testing evidence, ingest normalized artifacts, and generate the current quality report.

options.name: --contract
options.description: Authored testing intent contract path. [default: quality/testing-intent.yaml]

options.name: --results
options.description: TRX file or directory root to ingest.

options.name: --coverage
options.description: Cobertura file or directory root to ingest.

options.name: --out-dir
options.description: Directory for normalized quality artifacts. [default: artifacts/quality/testing]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Compute the quality artifacts without writing files. [default: False]

commands.name: attest
commands.description: Generate a derived repository evidence snapshot as HTML and JSON.

options.name: --scope
options.description: Repo-relative path prefixes or files to include in the snapshot scope.

options.name: --profile
options.description: Validation profile to use for the snapshot (core|traceable|auditable).

options.name: --emit
options.description: Derived output format to write (html|json|both). [default: both]

options.name: --out-dir
options.description: Directory for derived attestation artifacts. [default: artifacts/quality/attestation]

options.name: --config
options.description: Optional attestation config path. [default: quality/attestation.yaml]

options.name: --results
options.description: TRX file or directory root to ingest for evidence.

options.name: --coverage
options.description: Cobertura file or directory root to ingest for evidence.

options.name: --benchmarks
options.description: Benchmark evidence file or directory root to inspect.

options.name: --manual-qa
options.description: Manual QA evidence file or directory root to inspect.

options.name: --exec
options.description: Run configured evidence refresh commands before generating the snapshot. [default: False]

options.name: --no-exec
options.description: Do not execute configured evidence refresh commands. [default: False]

commands.name: show
commands.description: Read the latest normalized quality artifact or a selected evidence kind.

options.name: --kind
options.description: Artifact kind to show (report|inventory|results|coverage). [default: report]

options.name: --path
options.description: Optional explicit artifact path to read.

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Umbrella repo sync: run the item, doc, and nav sync stages. Use this for the common happy path.

options.name: --items
options.description: Run the `item sync` stage (GitHub issues/branches <-> local work items). [default: False]

options.name: --docs
options.description: Run the `doc sync` stage (backlinks + doc front matter). [default: False]

options.name: --nav
options.description: Run the `nav sync` stage (derived indexes). [default: False]

options.name: --issues
options.description: Sync GitHub issue links in the doc and nav stages. [default: True]

options.name: --import-issues
options.description: Pass through to the item sync stage to import unlinked GitHub issues (slower). [default: False]

options.name: --include-terminal-items
options.description: Include terminal work items in the doc and nav stages. [default: False]

options.name: --force
options.description: Pass through to the nav sync stage to rewrite derived sections even if unchanged. [default: False]

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report changes without writing files. [default: False]

options.name: --prefer
options.description: Pass through to the item sync stage when local and GitHub descriptions differ.

commands.name: guide
commands.description: Run the interactive guide for common tasks.

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate repository artifacts, links, and trace profiles.

options.name: --strict
options.description: Treat warnings as errors. [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show detailed validation output. [default: False]

options.name: --link-include
options.description: Repo-relative path prefixes to include in link validation.

options.name: --link-exclude
options.description: Repo-relative path prefixes to exclude from link validation.

options.name: --skip-doc-schema
options.description: Skip doc front matter schema validation. [default: False]

options.name: --profile
options.description: Validation profile to enforce (core|traceable|auditable).

options.name: --scope
options.description: Repo-relative path prefixes or files to validate.

commands.name: llm
commands.description: Group: AI-oriented help and guidance commands.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Print a comprehensive CLI reference for AI agents.
